Donners_2021._review_title: Pharmacokinetics and Associated Efficacy of Emicizumab in Humans: A Systematic Review
Donners_2021._source: Extracted from published paper (PMC8585815). Verified criteria.
Donners_2021.P: Humans (healthy volunteers or people with hemophilia A)
Donners_2021.C: Not required (any comparator or no comparator accepted)
Donners_2021.O: Original pharmacokinetic (PK) data, modeled PK data, or PK/pharmacodynamic (PD) relationships
Donners_2021.S: Any study design providing original PK data (clinical trials, pharmacometric analyses, case reports)
Donners_2021.E: Non-human studies; studies without PK or PK/PD data; non-English language; abstract or full text not accessible; duplicate reports of the same subject population

Sep_2021._review_title: The rodent object-in-context task: A systematic review and meta-analysis of important variables
Sep_2021._source: Extracted from published paper (PMC8284613). Verified criteria.
Sep_2021.P: Rodents (rats or mice, including genetically modified strains)
Sep_2021.C: Control animals (no treatment, saline injection, or sham operation)
Sep_2021.O: Context-dependent object recognition memory performance (discrimination ratio with standard error)
Sep_2021.S: Original research articles in English with a control group
Sep_2021.E: Non-English articles; non-rodent species; modified versions of the OIC task (e.g., context-location combinations, odor-based context memory, classical fear conditioning, operant conditioning); studies without a control group; studies not reporting sample size or discrimination ratio

Meijboom_2021._review_title: Patients Retransitioning from Biosimilar TNF-alpha Inhibitor to the Corresponding Originator: A Systematic Review
Meijboom_2021._source: Extracted from published paper (PMC8847209). Verified criteria.
Meijboom_2021.P: Patients who transitioned from an originator TNF-alpha inhibitor to a biosimilar and then retransitioned back to the originator
Meijboom_2021.I: Retransitioning from biosimilar TNF-alpha inhibitor back to the originator biologic
Meijboom_2021.C: Not required (descriptive studies of retransitioning outcomes accepted)
Meijboom_2021.O: Baseline characteristics of retransitioned patients, reasons for retransitioning, clinical outcomes after retransitioning
Meijboom_2021.S: Original research articles published in peer-reviewed journals
Meijboom_2021.E: Studies not reporting on retransitioning (originator to biosimilar and back); studies without baseline characteristics of transitioned patients; non-peer-reviewed publications
